title: Prepare application for production deployment

requirements.text: Update the h2 heading element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/h2[1] to reflect production-ready copy suitable for a live website

quotes: Now we have to go live

acceptanceCriteria: The h2 heading text is updated to professional, customer-facing copy
The text is appropriate for a live production environment

acceptanceCriteria: Container styling is consistent with the overall design system

requirements.text: Update the input element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/form[1]/div[2]/input[1] to ensure placeholder text, attributes, and styling are appropriate for production

quotes: Now we have to go live

acceptanceCriteria: Input placeholder text is professional and helpful
Input validation and error states work correctly
Input styling is consistent with production design

constraints: Only modify the 6 specific elements identified by their XPath expressions

Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain the existing React, Tailwind, and Shadcn stack
nonGoals: Changing backend functionality or API endpoints
Modifying elements outside the 6 selected XPath locations
Changing the overall page structure or navigation
